prestazioni: Engine: A16LET (1.6L Turbocharged I4) – Full forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (86.5mm, 9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 300+ hp reliability. Paired with a Garrett GT2867R turbo (0.63 A/R, 62 trim) on a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by TurboSmart, with a 44mm external wastegate (TurboSmart CompGate40) and 3-inch Tial Q BOV.

Fuel System: Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors (1000cc/min), and a custom ECU tune via Hondata KPro (adapted for Opel) with ethanol flex-fuel mapping (E85 compatible). Upgraded fuel lines with PTFE -6AN braided stainless steel (Earl’s Performance) and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (FPR) for precise boost control.

Suspension & Handling: KW Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers (8-position rebound, 16-position compression, adjustable ride height) with spherical top mounts (OMP) and poly bushings (SuperPro). Front: Custom 25mm adjustable anti-roll bar (Whiteline) with spherical end links. Rear: Polyurethane subframe bushings (Powerflex Black Series) and a Cusco 2-point strut brace. Brakes: AP Racing CP6640 front 6-pot calipers with 355mm 2-piece rotors (DBA 4000 Series) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Brembo 08.2104.72 rear calipers and 300mm rotors.
estetica: Aero: Custom carbon fiber widebody kit by Prior Design (PD-GT1 Corsa OPC) with integrated front splitter, side skirts, and a 150mm adjustable rear wing (Rocket Bunny-style). Front bumper modified with a custom 3D-printed air curtain (CFD-optimized for downforce) and a carbon fiber lip (Seibon). Rear diffuser: Custom 3-piece carbon fiber unit with integrated exhaust cutouts (for 3-inch dual exhaust).

Wheels & Tires: BBS LM-RS (8.5x18 ET35 front, 9.5x18 ET30 rear) in matte gold with custom center caps (OPC logo). Tires: Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (225/40/18 front, 255/35/18 rear) with nitrogen inflation. Fender flares rolled and pulled (1.5-inch wider than stock) with custom inner liners (carbon fiber).

Interior & Details: Full carbon fiber interior by Varis (dashboard, door cards, center console, and Recaro SR7 seat backs). Custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) by Custom Cages UK, painted OPC Arden Blue. Steering wheel: Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede) with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash. Shift knob: Short-throw titanium (TWM) with OPC logo. Exterior accents: Full vinyl wrap (3M Gloss Nardo Grey) with OPC Arden Blue stripes (factory Nürburgring Edition pattern) and carbon fiber mirror caps (Seibon).
